headline: 3 Nasdaq 100 Stocks on Our Watchlist
summary: The Nasdaq 100 (^NDX) is packed with high-growth companies, and while the market is competitive, some are pulling ahead. A handful of standout businesses are continuing to scale, delivering strong financials and market leadership.

headline: Analog Devices Inc. (NASDAQ:ADI) Combines Accelerating Growth with Bullish Technical Setup
summary: Analog Devices (ADI) combines accelerating earnings growth with a strong technical uptrend and a constructive consolidation pattern, offering a potential high-growth momentum opportunity.
